$comment: Chat-eval question battery. Each question declares its domain and the deterministic checks the scorer applies. groundTruth paths refer to the ground-truth object assembled by run.mjs from /api/store/summary and /api/connectors.

questions.question: What were my total sales today?
What are my top 5 selling items this week?
Is anything about to run out of stock?
Any voids or suspicious transactions I should look at?
Compare this week's sales to last week.
Which connectors are active on my account?
Show me my labor costs for the last 7 days.
What can you help me with?
Give me three things in one answer: today's total sales, my single best-selling item today, and any alerts I should know about.
What's the weather in Miami right now?
